name: Cohere
description: Cohere provides enterprise AI models for text generation, semantic search, and content analysis. It offers chat completion with tool use, text embeddings (including multimodal), document reranking, and text classification through a unified API.

capabilities.name: chat_create
capabilities.description: Generate conversational responses using Cohere's language models. Supports multi-turn dialogue, tool use, document grounding, citations, and structured JSON output.

capabilities.name: chat_create_stream
capabilities.description: Generate conversational responses as a real-time stream of server-sent events for token-by-token display.

capabilities.name: embed_create
capabilities.description: Generate vector embeddings for text or image inputs, useful for semantic search, clustering, and classification tasks.

capabilities.name: rerank_create
capabilities.description: Reorder a list of documents by relevance to a search query, improving search result quality for RAG pipelines.

capabilities.name: classify_create
capabilities.description: Classify text inputs into predefined categories using few-shot examples. Useful for sentiment analysis, topic tagging, and content moderation.
